stimulus:
[Bar graph: Test Results for Two New Plastic Recycling Processes. Vertical axis: Percent plastic recovered (0-80%). Two categories of plastic.]

  • PET bottles — Process A: 60%, Process B: 25%
  • polypropylene containers — Process A: 70%, Process B: 35%

Engineers tested two new processes for recycling household plastics. For PET bottles, Process A recovered ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the graph to complete the statement?
rationale:
Choice C is correct because the graph shows Process A recovered 60% of PET bottles.

Choice A is incorrect: 25% is Process B’s result for PET bottles, not Process A’s. Choice B is incorrect: 35% is Process B’s result for polypropylene containers. Choice D is incorrect: 70% is Process A’s result for polypropylene containers, not PET bottles.
